theme_and_archetype.rationale: App emphasizes a cosmic 'Galaxy View' with neon accents against a deep void, fitting the futuristic, abstract visualization of mental load.

primary_button.classes: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00f5a0] to-[#00d4ff] text-[#050508] font-bold rounded-[12px] px-6 py-3

zone_chip.classes: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[rgba(255,255,255,0.06)] border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
zone_chip.style: Dynamically set text and border/glow color based on zone_accents

stress_badge.classes: absolute top-4 right-4 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold backdrop-blur-md

ai_insight_bar.classes: absolute bottom-20 left-4 right-4 bg-[rgba(255,255,255,0.04)] border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.08)] backdrop-blur-xl rounded-[16px] p-4 flex items-center gap-3 z-40

bottom_tab_bar.classes: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-16 bg-[#050508]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.08)] flex justify-around items-center z-50

auth.description: Signup, login, email verification, password reset, Google OAuth.
auth.layout: Center-aligned glassmorphism cards on cosmic background.

onboarding.layout: Step-by-step full screen carousel. Use onboarding_step1 image.

galaxy_home.description: Galaxy view with animated cosmic canvas placeholder. Floating sidebar for zones. AI insight bar.
galaxy_home.layout: Full-width canvas id='galaxy-canvas'. Overlay stress_badge top-right.

tasks.description: Grouped by life zone. Add/edit/delete/complete tasks. Urgency badges.
tasks.layout: Vertical scroll list. Glassmorphism list items.

ai_assistant.layout: Chat interface. Glassmorphism message bubbles. Input pinned to bottom above tabs.

stress_forecast.description: 30-day calendar showing mental load. Color coded cells.
stress_forecast.layout: Grid calendar. Locked for free users (overlay upgrade modal).

settings.description: Profile, subscription management, sign out, account delete.

animations.galaxy_canvas: Slow rotating particle system in Three.js (if applicable) or CSS rotation with blur for placeholder.
animations.glass_hover: Transform translate-y-[-2px] and increase shadow glow on hover/press.
animations.page_transitions: Fade and slight scale-up (0.98 to 1) for mobile-native feel.

galaxy_background.description: Deep space cosmic nebula background, highly abstract
galaxy_background.usage: Use as fallback background for the Galaxy view id='galaxy-canvas'

onboarding_illustration.description: Abstract 3D glassmorphism spheres in dark space

forecast_background.description: Abstract glowing calendar grid floating in cosmic void
forecast_background.usage: Use as a background element or locked state illustration for the Stress Forecast screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the #050508 background and #e8e8f0 text colors.
Implement glassmorphism globally using the defined bg and border rgba strings.
Use data-testid on ALL interactive elements as defined in the testids arrays.
Ensure 'Syne' is applied to headings and 'DM Sans' to body via Tailwind font families.
The Galaxy home screen must include a container with id='galaxy-canvas' spanning the majority of the view.
Use Tailwind classes for the primary gradient: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00f5a0] to-[#00d4ff]
Mock Supabase and Stripe endpoints if full backend is not connected yet, but build the UI components completely.
The Forecast route must check plan tier and show the Pro Upgrade modal if tier is 'Free'. Plans are Free (€0), Pro (€9), Family (€15).
